Document:
# Melee Weapons
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Melee%20Weapons"/]
## Melee Weapons
When ammunition runs dry or silence is required, melee weapons are a survivor's best friend. They never run out of ammo, but they require getting close - and that carries its own risks.
[bold]Category[/bold] [bold]Description[/bold] [textlink="[bold]One-Handed[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/One-Handed_Melee"/] Knives, hatchets, batons, and short blades. Quick to swing and easy to carry alongside a firearm. [textlink="[bold]Two-Handed[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Two-Handed_Melee"/] Spears, sledgehammers, greatswords, and long blades. Slower but hit harder.
